subcodes.first_line: All things have testified to the manifestation of the Creator of heaven, and the rapture of the Call hath seized the Concourse on High, yet most of the people remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الاشیاء بظهور فاطر السماء و اخذ جذب الندآء الملا الاعلی و القوم اکثرهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
